summary: Integration tests for storage package covering channels, messages, summaries, and sync state repositories
side_effects: creates ephemeral SQLite databases in temp directories
notes: Tests core storage patterns via ephemeral Store instances. Helpers: openTestStore (temp DB), seedChannelAndMessages. Tests Channel source types (default 'telegram', custom 'rss'), SyncState with string checkpoints, MessageSummary CRUD and filtering, GetUnsummarizedMessages/ByChannels with channel ID filtering. Confirms upsert semantics: Create() on duplicate message IDs replaces prior summary.
